name: OpenClaw Autoresearch
description: Autonomous skill prompt optimizer based on Karpathy's autoresearch methodology. Works with OpenClaw, Claude Code, Cursor, and any AI coding agent.
review: Well-executed meta-tool implementing Karpathy's autoresearch methodology for prompt optimization. Zero dependencies, security-clean, bilingual documentation (English + Chinese). Production-ready with excellent SKILL.md. Fills unique gap in catalog — no competing autoresearch skill. Approved by Gamora.
